name: Lilamon

signature_move.name: Lila Shower
signature_move.description: Fires multiple beams from its leaf-like fingers.

description: A Fairy Digimon which has an appearance like the lilac, a flower that is loved by everyone. It is pure and innocent, and despite its beautiful appearance, it is said to govern over death and rebirth. Its leaves are toxic, and are enough to bring death to the opponent. Its Special Moves are firing countless slender beams from its leaf-like fingers ( Lila Shower ), and continuously slapping with its extensible hands ( Beauty Slap ). In addition, it is said that those who suffer this technique instantly fall in love with Lilamon. Also, it can dance gracefully, scattering lovely-smelling pollen to bewitch the opponent ( Un Deux Pollen ).
